data.body: Consideration: [Reliability] Timeout and graceful degradation — Story C adds a curl --max-time 30 guard to the researcher, but the total agent dispatch time (CQL derivation + API call + summary generation) can exceed 30s. Story D must specify graceful degradation when the researcher times out or errors: roadmap SKILL.md should continue to the exploration phase without researcher results rather than failing the session. Add a done definition: 'When this story is complete, if dso:confluence-researcher times out or returns an error during roadmap dispatch, roadmap continues to its exploration phase with a logged warning and no researcher output.' (taxonomy: scope_overlaps)
